---
name: "Feature (SAFe)"
about: User-facing capability delivering business value
title: "Feature: <concise outcome>"
labels: ["feature","priority/triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
Describe the user value and outcome.

## Business Context
- Who benefits and why?

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AC1 …
- [ ] AC2 …

## Non-Functional Requirements
- [ ] Performance (target/metric)
- [ ] Security/Privacy
- [ ] Observability (logs/metrics)

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Docs/CHANGELOG
- [ ] CI green
- [ ] Backward compatible (or migration notes)

## Story Points
<size t-shirt or numeric>

## WSJF Hints (optional)
- Business Value:
- Time Criticality:
- Risk Reduction/Opportunity Enablement:
- Effort (Story Points):
